title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...Blowing snow expected. Winds gusting as high as 45 mph.

* WHERE...Western Arctic Coast.

* WHEN...From 7 PM Tuesday to 4 PM AKDT Thursday.

* IMPACTS...Travel may be difficult. Areas of blowing snow could
significantly reduce visibility.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...Winds will primarily be out of the
east-northeast and will be strongest between Point Lay and Point
Hope.
